authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(96) — Miller Canyon Creek from Silverwood Lake upstream (San Bernardino Co.)
sources.quotedText: (96) Miller Canyon Creek from Silverwood Lake upstream (San Bernardino Co.). All year. 5 trout

sources.title: San Bernardino National Forest — Miller Canyon Creek Recreation Site
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Valley layer record for gaz_id 245923, "Miller Canyon", San Bernardino County, CA (GNIS has no separate Stream-class record for "Miller Canyon Creek" in San Bernardino Co.; this Valley/canyon feature is the drainage the creek is named for, and its downstream endpoint sits ~2.1 km from Silverwood Lake's GNIS point)
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":245923,"gaz_name":"Miller Canyon","gaz_featureclass":"Valley","fcode":15050,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Bernardino"}; geometry point (Web Mercator -13059378.5774, 4065985.2486, the downstream/lake-ward endpoint of the two-point line) converts to lon -117.31439, lat 34.27647, i.e. the file's corrected coordinate (-117.3144, 34.2765). The file's prior coordinate (-117.3130, 34.2980) was ~2.4 km away, inside Silverwood Lake itself rather than at the canyon mouth.

parameters.note: Applies to Miller Canyon Creek from Silverwood Lake upstream.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, from Silverwood Lake upstream
regulations.verbatimText: Miller Canyon Creek from Silverwood Lake upstream (San Bernardino Co.). All year.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
